title: Creativation 2018!
excerpt: Happy February! I feel like I say this all the time, but man is time just flying, or what?! I'm still not completely unpacked from Creativation, but at least part 1 of the video is done! How funny is this…
body:
Happy February! I feel like I say this all the time, but man is time just flying, or what?! I'm still not completely unpacked from Creativation, but at least part 1 of the video is done! How funny is this thumbnail?!

Hope you feel like you were right there with us! I went on live TV on Fox10 to talk really quickly about bullet journaling - you can check that out here.

To see the whole collection, be sure to watch Scrap Time's video.
